assignments.name: Assign_Record_Type_ID_Pay_Rule
assignments.label: Assign Record Type ID Pay Rule

Flow.description: Screenflow to help walk users through the creation of Custom 'Pay' Rules. This can be launched from objects: Contract, Job Role, Shift, Site & Location. ALN-249: Modified to include Expense Rules ALN-293: Modified to cater for Start/End times for Allowances ALN-335 - Allow competency based allowances in shift selection

formulas.name: frmFrequency
formulas.expression: IF( {!Payment_Frequency1} = "One Per Shift", "One Per Shift", IF( {!Payment_Frequency1} = "One Per Shift - Allowance Only", "One Per Shift - Allowance Only", IF( {!Payment_Frequency1} = "Quantity", "Quantity", IF( {!Payment_Frequency1} = "Shift Hours - Allowance Only", "Shift Hours - Allowance Only", IF( {!Payment_Frequency1} = "Daily", "Daily", IF( {!Payment_Frequency1} = "Allowance Hours", "Allowance Hours", IF( {!Payment_Frequency1} = "Shift Hours", "Shift Hours","" )))))))

formulas.name: frmName
formulas.expression: IF( {!Pay_Rule_Type} = "Payment", "Payment Rule - " + {!Award_Classification.recordName}, IF( {!Pay_Rule_Type} = "Timesheet Activity", "Timesheet Activity - " + {!Timesheet_Activity.recordName}, "Allowance Rule - " + {!Allowance.recordName} ))

Flow.label: Pay Rule Builder

recordLookups.name: Get_Custom_Rules
recordLookups.label: Get Custom Rules
recordLookups.filterLogic: (11 AND (12 OR 13 OR 14) AND (1 AND 2) OR (3 AND 4) OR (5 AND 6) OR (7 AND 8) OR (9 AND 10))

fields.name: txtAllowanceOnly
fields.fieldText:
Invalid Selection

When the Payment Frequency is set to "Allowance Only", or "Quantity", allowances must be claimed.

Please select "Yes" for "Available in Active App" and then claim it against the shift.

fields.name: txtClone1
fields.fieldText:
Select the Pay Rules you want to copy to this record.

When you click "Next," all selected Pay Rules will be cloned and linked to this record.


Note: Only Pay Rules that do not have an expiration date can be cloned.

value.stringValue: Name:0, Payee_Allowance_Record__c:0, Allowance_Payment_Frequency__c:0, Available_on_Active_App__c:0, Timesheet_Activity__c:0, Competency__c:0, Award_Classification__c:0, Award_Level__c:0

fields.name: txtcompetencyerror
fields.fieldText:
Competency based allowances can only be One Per Shift, Shift Hours or Daily.

Please change the allowance payment frequency.

fields.name: Success_Message
fields.fieldText: Your Expense Rule has been successfully created.

fields.name: txtInvalidDaily
fields.fieldText:
When the Payment Frequency is set to 'Daily', the allowance cannot be claimed and must be automatically processed.

Please select "No" for "Available in Active App".

fields.name: txtNoSelection
fields.fieldText: Pay Rule builder must be launched from the 'Pay Rule Builder' button on the desired record.

fields.name: Select_an_option_to_begin
fields.helpText:
New Pay Rule: Create a new Pay Rule and associate it with this record.


Clone Pay Rules: Copy Pay Rules from another object and link them to this record.

fields.name: txtClone
fields.fieldText:
Select a record to clone custom rules from.

Once selected, you will have the option to choose specific rules from a list to copy to this record.

fields.name: txtWelcome
fields.fieldText:
This utility helps you easily create Allowance and Competency Based Pay Rules.

Plese note the options available depend on the object you launched this utility from.

fields.name: Pay_Rule_Type
fields.helpText:
Allowance Pay Rules can be used to create automated processed allowances, or claimable Employee adhoc allowances.


Timesheet Activity Pay Rules will automatically apply the Timesheet Activity to the related Shift


Payment Pay Rules allows Employees to be paid a different rate of pay, such as specialist rates.

fields.name: Effective_Date
fields.helpText:
The effective date controls the availability of allowances in the Active App based upon the Shifts Date.


When processing allowances:

If Weekly/Daily the effective date will be based upon the start date of the timesheet period. For example if the Effective Date is 04/06/2024 and the Timesheet start date is 03/06/2024 it will not be processed.


If Shift based, the allowance will be processed based upon the Shifts date being greater than or equal to the effective date.

fields.name: Competency_Based_Allowance
fields.helpText:
Indicates whether a competency is required for this allowance:


Yes: Employees must have the specified competency to qualify for the allowance.


No: No competency is required; the allowance will be paid regardless of qualifications.

fields.name: Rate_Selection_Type
fields.helpText:
Defines how the rate of pay/charge will be determined during the creation of related Assignment Rates.


Award-Based Rate: The rate will be calculated based on the employee's Award Classification and Award Level.


Fixed Rate: A flat rate will be applied, regardless of the employee's classification or level.

fields.name: Claim_in_Active_App
fields.helpText:
Yes - Allowance must be claimed from the Employee within the Active app to be processed during Timesheet Interpretation.


No - Allowance will be automatically processed during Timesheet Interpretation.

fields.name: Payment_Frequency1
fields.helpText:
One Per Shift - Automatically process allowance with time during Timesheet Interpretation with a quantity of 1 for each Shift.


One Per Shift - Allowance Only - Will process the allowance with a quantity of 1 without time. This means the employee will only be paid for this allowance for this shift.


Shift Hours - Automatically process allowance during Timesheet Interpretation with a quantity based upon the Shifts total hours.


Shift Hours - Allowance Only - Will process the allowance with a quantity based upon the Shifts total hours. This means the employee will only be paid for this allowance for this shift.


Quantity - Will process the allowance with the Employee defined quantity in addition to the hours worked.


Daily - Will process 1 allowance per day, regardless of the number of Shifts worked.

fields.name: txtAllowanceOnly1
fields.fieldText:
When the Payment Frequency is set to "Allowance Only", or "Quantity", allowances must be claimed.

Please select "Yes" for "Available in Active App" and then claim it against the shift.

fields.name: txtDaily
fields.fieldText:
When the Payment Frequency is set to 'Daily', the allowance cannot be claimed and must be automatically processed.

Please select "No" for "Available in Active App".

fields.name: txtCompetency
fields.fieldText: Competency based allowances can only be One Per Shift, Shift Hours or Daily.

fields.name: Maximum_Daily_Allowance_Quantity
fields.helpText:
Defines the maximum number of allowances that can be processed per Timesheet period.


E.g. If set to 3 and an Employee works 5 days, they will only get the allowance paid 3 times.


If left blank, no limit will apply.

fields.name: txtPayment_Rules
fields.fieldText:
Payment Rules define the criteria used to determine a different Minimum Pay Rate for a Shift.

These rules set the variables that automation will use to apply the updated MPR, ensuring employees are paid correctly based on the conditions outlined below.

fields.name: Claim_in_Active_App1
fields.helpText:
Yes - Payment must be claimed from the Employee within the Active app to apply the relevant MPR to the Shift.


No - The relevant MPR will be automatically applied to the Shift if the Employee meets the required criteria.

fields.name: Competency_Based_Payment_Rule
fields.helpText: Employees must have the required competency to receive the higher pay rate. Employees without the competency will be paid their regular rate.

fields.name: Payment_Rate_Selection_Type
fields.helpText:
Defines how the Minimum Pay Rate (MPR) is determined for the shift:


Award-Based Rate: MPR is based on the employee's Award Level within the specified Award Classification (e.g., Specialist RN2.1 for a Registered Nurse at level RN2.1).


Fixed Rate: MPR is set to a specific Award Classification and Level (e.g., Specialist RN2.1) regardless of the employee's actual level.

value.stringValue: Name:0, Effective_Date__c:0, Award_Classification__c:0, Payee_Allowance_Record__c:0, Timesheet_Activity__c:0, Available_on_Active_App__c:0, Allowance_Payment_Frequency__c:0
